title: Alchemancy X Create Compat
description: Adds Alchemancy dormant properties and recipes for Create + addons
body:
With this most Create items now have dormant properties, there are so many properties attached to so many items that listing them here would take too long, check them out in-game!

New in v3, It adds dormant properties for addons: Create: Crafts & Additions and Create: Enchantment Industry (and technically Create: Dragons Plus for an item)

This datapack/mod also add recipes for transforming items into larger/smaller versions of themselves, and a few other miscellaneous ones
